description: AF-03: Credential-stuffing attack. Triage escalated after detecting 47 login attempts in 3 minutes from a single IP across multiple user accounts — actor not in baseline, high-velocity cross-account pattern.

finding.detail: 47 login attempts in 3 minutes across 23 distinct user accounts from IP 185.220.101.88
finding.triage_annotation: Actor 185.220.101.88 not in baseline (0 prior sessions). 47 login attempts in 3 minutes: temporal clustering matches credential stuffing. No upstream trigger. Escalating: credential theft test inconclusive — automated enumeration pattern.

check_baseline_result.note: IP 185.220.101.88 has no baseline history — known Tor exit node per threat intel

search_events_result.note: All failures, all distinct accounts, no upstream trigger

related.note: Same IP 2 days ago — prior credential stuffing attempt, escalated to investigate

expected_verdict.note: High-confidence credential stuffing. Agent should escalate (or remediate if it identifies block-ip action). Credential theft test: not distinguishable — automated tooling cannot be separated from stolen credentials driving automated tool.
